properties.name: circle-fill-color
properties.description: Fill color for circle point symbols. Accepts OpenLayers color values such as CSS color strings, RGBA arrays, gradients, patterns, or null.

properties.name: circle
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: fill-color
properties.description: Fill color for polygon interiors. Accepts OpenLayers color values such as CSS color strings, RGBA arrays, gradients, patterns, or null.

properties.name: circle-fill
properties.description: Sass nested namespace for Mapsight vector style properties matching circle-fill-*.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: circle-radius
properties.description: Radius in pixels for circle point symbols. OpenLayers requires a radius to render a Circle image style.

properties.name: radius
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: circle-stroke-color
properties.description: Stroke color for the outline of circle point symbols. Accepts OpenLayers stroke color values.

properties.name: stroke-color
properties.description: Stroke color for line strings and polygon boundaries. Accepts OpenLayers color, gradient, or pattern values.

properties.name: circle-stroke
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: circle-stroke-width
properties.description: Stroke width in pixels for the outline of circle point symbols.

properties.name: stroke-width
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: width
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: fill
properties.description: Sass nested namespace for Mapsight vector style properties matching fill-*.

properties.name: icon-anchorx
properties.description: Horizontal icon anchor. The anchor defaults to the icon center; numeric Mapsight values are passed to OpenLayers icon anchor handling.

properties.name: icon-anchorX
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property icon-anchorx.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: anchorx
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-anchorx.

properties.name: anchorX
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-anchorx.

properties.name: icon-anchory
properties.description: Vertical icon anchor. The anchor defaults to the icon center; numeric Mapsight values are passed to OpenLayers icon anchor handling.

properties.name: icon-anchorY
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property icon-anchory.

properties.name: anchory
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-anchory.

properties.name: anchorY
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-anchory.

properties.name: icon-offsetx
properties.description: Horizontal sprite offset in pixels. Used with icon size to select a sub-rectangle from the source image.

properties.name: icon-offsetX
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property icon-offsetx.

properties.name: offsetx
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: offsetX
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: icon-offsety
properties.description: Vertical sprite offset in pixels. Used with icon size to select a sub-rectangle from the source image.

properties.name: icon-offsetY
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property icon-offsety.

properties.name: offsety
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: offsetY
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: icon-opacity
properties.description: Icon opacity from 0 to 1.

properties.name: opacity
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-opacity.

properties.name: icon-scale
properties.description: Icon scale factor. OpenLayers accepts a single number or a two-dimensional scale; do not combine absolute icon width/height with scale.

properties.name: scale
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-scale.

properties.name: icon-sizex
properties.description: Width in pixels of the icon image or sprite sub-rectangle selected from the source image.

properties.name: icon-sizeX
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property icon-sizex.

properties.name: sizex
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-sizex.

properties.name: sizeX
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-sizex.

properties.name: icon-sizey
properties.description: Height in pixels of the icon image or sprite sub-rectangle selected from the source image.

properties.name: icon-sizeY
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property icon-sizey.

properties.name: sizey
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-sizey.

properties.name: sizeY
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-sizey.

properties.name: icon-snaptopixel
properties.description: Whether icon rendering should align to device pixels where supported by the OpenLayers image style renderer.

properties.name: icon-snapToPixel
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property icon-snaptopixel.

properties.name: snaptopixel
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-snaptopixel.

properties.name: snapToPixel
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-snaptopixel.

properties.name: icon-src
properties.description: Image URL used for icon point symbols. OpenLayers requires a source image or loaded image to render an Icon style.

properties.name: src
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property icon-src.

properties.name: image-circle-fill-color
properties.description: Fill color for a circle image symbol nested under the style image property.

properties.name: image
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: image-circle
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: image-circle-fill
properties.description: Sass nested namespace for Mapsight vector style properties matching image-circle-fill-*.

properties.name: image-circle-radius
properties.description: Radius in pixels for a circle image symbol nested under the style image property.

properties.name: image-type
properties.description: Mapsight image symbolizer selector. Use it to choose the OpenLayers image style kind, such as a circle or icon, for point rendering.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property image-type.

properties.name: stroke
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: stroke-linedash
properties.description: Line dash pattern for strokes: an array of numbers specifying alternating drawn segment and gap lengths.

properties.name: stroke-lineDash
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property stroke-linedash.

properties.name: linedash
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property stroke-linedash.

properties.name: lineDash
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property stroke-linedash.

properties.name: text-alignment
properties.description: Mapsight text alignment helper for label placement. Prefer text-textAlign when mapping directly to OpenLayers Text textAlign.

properties.name: text
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property text-alignment.

properties.name: text-fill-color
properties.description: Fill color for label text. OpenLayers uses a dark default fill (#333) when no text fill is provided; use null for no fill.

properties.name: text-fill
properties.description: Sass nested namespace for Mapsight vector style properties matching text-fill-*.

properties.name: text-font
properties.description: CSS font string for labels, as accepted by CanvasRenderingContext2D.font. OpenLayers defaults to '10px sans-serif'.

properties.name: font
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property text-font.

properties.name: text-offsetx
properties.description: Horizontal label offset in pixels. OpenLayers defaults to 0.

properties.name: text-offsetX
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property text-offsetx.

properties.name: text-offsety
properties.description: Vertical label offset in pixels. OpenLayers defaults to 0.

properties.name: text-offsetY
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property text-offsety.

properties.name: text-placement
properties.description: Label placement mode. Use 'point' for point placement or 'line' to render text along line geometry.

properties.name: placement
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property text-placement.

properties.name: text-stroke-color
properties.description: Stroke color for label outlines. Useful for improving text contrast over map content.

properties.name: text-stroke
properties.description: Nested Mapsight vector style property segment. The exact OpenLayers option depends on the surrounding Sass property namespace.

properties.name: text-stroke-width
properties.description: Stroke width in pixels for label outlines.

properties.name: text-testalign
properties.description: Legacy or misspelled Mapsight text alignment property. Prefer text-textAlign.

properties.name: testalign
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property text-testalign.

properties.name: text-text
properties.description: Label text content. OpenLayers accepts plain strings with line breaks or rich text arrays; Mapsight values can also be dynamic via attr(...).

properties.name: text-textalign
properties.description: Horizontal label alignment. OpenLayers supports 'left', 'right', 'center', 'end', and 'start'.

properties.name: text-textAlign
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property text-textalign.

properties.name: textalign
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property text-textalign.

properties.name: textAlign
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property text-textalign.

properties.name: text-textbaseline
properties.description: Vertical label baseline. OpenLayers supports 'bottom', 'top', 'middle', 'alphabetic', 'hanging', and 'ideographic'.

properties.name: text-textBaseline
properties.description: Case-preserving alias for Mapsight vector style property text-textbaseline.

properties.name: textbaseline
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property text-textbaseline.

properties.name: textBaseline
properties.description: Nested form of Mapsight vector style property text-textbaseline.

properties.name: zindex
properties.description: Z index for this style. OpenLayers uses it to order style rendering; higher values draw above lower values.

functions.name: attr
functions.description: Reads a feature property, or an environment value when using the --env- prefix.

functions.name: mapsightRuntimeIcon
functions.description: Returns a synchronous runtime icon URL and participates in volatile style cache hashing.

functions.name: replace
functions.description: Performs a string replacement while compiling Mapsight vector style values.
